data.name: College Gay Sex - Episode 7
data.detailed_description:
An erotic VISUAL NOVEL featuring HD graphics, steamy ANIMATIONS, and realistic-looking characters.
Cody and Jax’s spring break vacation takes an unexpected turn when they come across their villa neighbor sunbathing nude by the pool.

GAME DESCRIPTION

EPISODE 7

After a grueling semester of endless exams and late-night study sessions, Cody and Jax are eager for a well-deserved break. So, when the chance to escape to a luxurious villa on the sun-soaked shores of the Caribbean came up, they jumped at it.
The only catch? They’ll have to share the villa with a stranger.
Knowing not everyone is as sexually open as they are, they’re prepared to tone down their wild side and save their steamy sessions for after dark. But nothing could’ve prepared them for their new neighbor, an undeniably hot, bold, and completely shameless man with no problem showing off his goods by the pool.

Will Cody and Jax be able to resist temptation?
Or will their wild side break free in paradise?

Follow their story and find out.

b]FEATURES[/b]

- HD renders and animations
- Video and image gallery

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
